_comment: LCSC part assignments for JLCPCB PCBA, keyed by KiCad footprint name (the 'Package' column from `kicad-cli pcb export pos`). scripts/gen-jlcpcb-bom-cpl.py joins this against the position file to emit BOM/CPL. See v4/README.md 'How parts are assigned' for the full rules.

diode_tht_sod123.note: ST(Semtech) 1N4148W. JLCPCB Basic part. Alt: Jingdao C115103. Set rotation to match diode polarity in DFM.

smd_805.note: UNI-ROYAL 0805W8F1000T5E. JLCPCB Basic part. Alt: YAGEO C105577.

D_SOD-123FL_HandSolder.note: Littelfuse SMF5.0CA. JLCPCB Extended part, low stock (~449), re-confirm before ordering. Alt: MDD C364279, TWGMC C726939. Bidirectional, so rotation is irrelevant.

SW_TACT_ALPS_SKQGABE010.note: ALPS SKQGABE010. JLCPCB Extended part. Alt: ALPS SKQGAFE010 C202424. Footprint-exact match.
